mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, channel, channel_user_id AS channelUserId, status, extra, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM notify_channel_binding WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND channel = #{channel} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notify_channel_binding (user_id, channel, channel_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{channel}, #{channelUserId}, #{status}, NOW(3), NOW(3)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE channel_user_id = VALUES(channel_user_id), status = VALUES(status), updated_at = NOW(3)
